programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Going Off Grid
programme.desc: By using gridlines, an object can be scaled up (magnified) or scaled down (shrunk). In this episode mathemagician Eric shows how to draw a picture of yourself that's completely to scale - even if the original is teeny tiny!

programme.title: A Singing Cat
programme.desc: A shy antelope needs surgery, while a cute orphaned fox cub gets checked over. Johnny and Inel discover a singing cat. And a gull tries to fly free again after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Reflecting on Mirror Writing
programme.desc: Mirror, mirror on the wall, can you read Eric's handwriting at all? In this episode Eric explores mirror writing: a reversed way of writing seen on for instance ambulances, where the word 'AMBULANCE' is often written in a mirrored way.

programme.title: Eggcellent Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts find a mysterious egg on the beach, and try to find out who it might belong to. They discover it's a sea turtle when the whole beach hatches at once!

programme.title: Superchutes!
programme.desc: Eric makes a parachute that will slow down a falling egg just enough so it doesn't get smashed when it hits the ground. But first he experiments to figure out the best parachute size. He discovers that NASA also use parachutes to drop robotic probes on to the moon.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: Save the Sandbank
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts restore an eroded riverbank by using a trebuchet to transport sand.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Trip to Argentina
programme.desc: Milo, upset by his team's loss, decides to switch teams. Alim insists loyalty is for life and takes them to Argentina. They meet Sabrina, a San Lorenzo fan. After nearly causing a riot by using a wrong color, they learn that in Argentina, team loyalty is forever.

programme.title: Gears For Fears
programme.desc: Armed with only flashlights, Brett, Raign, and Joy explore the frightening tunnel while Hulk, who is petrified, stays behind. Hulk must face his fears and brave the darkness as they try to solve the next riddle. But a mishap threatens to trap them in the cavern forever.

programme.title: Rose's Fairy Tale Collection
programme.desc: Rose's favorite Fairy Tale Collection is confiscated by Doctor LeFrog because she's distracted from her potions assignment. When Vicky and Shire Cat create a potion causing campus dragons to shrink and grow chaotically, our heroes need Rose's collection to save the day.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Hawaii
programme.desc: Hawaii island-hopping: Lava exploration on the Big Island by land and sea with local teens, muddy ATV ride in Kauai, and cultural insights at a lively luau. A week of thrilling adventures and Hawaiian traditions!

programme.title: The Maze
programme.desc: The Nektons find a mysterious underwater maze. When they enter it, they get trapped inside. And what's worse - they're not alone!

programme.title: Invisiboy!
programme.desc: Bored, Robbie visits Motor and secretly takes his invisibility helmet. Now invisible, he pranks everyone! But soon he realizes being unseen isn't so fun after all. The helmet's locked, and he needs help-how do you take off something no one can see... or reach?

programme.title: Save the Sandbank
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts restore an eroded riverbank by using a trebuchet to transport sand.

programme.title: Explosive Energy!
programme.desc: Prepare to meet your body's enormous, explosive energy storage system - your liver! Plus, it's time for Dr. Xand to scrub up as he joins Lilia in surgery for an amazing operation on her brain.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Bus
programme.desc: Henry meets a red bus in London. Bus has lots of tourists arriving for a tour but his driver has gotten stuck in traffic.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Surfboard
programme.desc: Henry meets a surfboard stuck upright in the sand at the beach. Henry becomes a surfer and helps Surfboard live his dream.

programme.title: Humpback Whale
programme.desc: Mommy and Daddy Owl struggle to understand the difference between whales - the animals and Wales - the country, leading to confusion, frustration, and a classic hit or two from Tom Jones.

programme.title: Tori Boggs: Jump Rope Champion
programme.desc: Tori Boggs holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most frog double under skips in thirty seconds. The legendary jump roper shows how her record-breaking skipping skills helped her become the best in the world.

programme.title: Explosive Energy!
programme.desc: Prepare to meet your body's enormous, explosive energy storage system - your liver! Plus, it's time for Dr. Xand to scrub up as he joins Lilia in surgery for an amazing operation on her brain.

programme.title: Going Off Grid
programme.desc: By using gridlines, an object can be scaled up (magnified) or scaled down (shrunk). In this episode mathemagician Eric shows how to draw a picture of yourself that's completely to scale - even if the original is teeny tiny!

programme.title: Newts' White Birthday
programme.desc: Just when everyone seems to have forgotten, the creatures of Kiwifruit Valley give Newts her most magical birthday ever.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E9 - Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: E22 - The Pool
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E9 - Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: E10 - Rise Of The Vacubots
programme.desc: Messy goes to OKIDO to find out why vacuum cleaners are so noisy and inadvertently releases a huge swarm of Vacubot 2000s across OKIDO City!

programme.title: E26 - Mojo Draws The Line
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

programme.title: E44 - Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: E43 - Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: E10 - The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: E4 - What's Hot?
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: E22 - Tomatina Festival, Bunol, Spain
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get caught up in Spain's Tomatina Festival. The Tomato Battle takes place every August in the town of Bunol, near to Valencia.

programme.title: E45 - Road Trip
programme.desc: Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: E9 - Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: E10 - Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: E27 - Go Jet Academy: Compass Navigators
programme.desc: Can Kyan and Foz use new compass skills to navigate their way out of an academy maze?

programme.title: E13 - Shallot Circus
programme.desc: The Shallots have discovered acrobatics and are inspired to put on a show.

programme.title: E30 - Leaves
programme.desc: There are leaves all over the place, Stanley tries to gather them up in his van with his leaf blower, but it is harder than he thought and fills Myrtle's house with them instead.

programme.title: E40 - It's Time To Make Shadow Puppets
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are ready to watch a Captain Chloe film. Suddenly, the lights go out!

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E45 - The Singing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out on a walk in the countryside. Its been a long walk and the squirrels are starting to get tired, but it's a long way back. Don't worry, Duggee has his singing badge.

programme.title: E44 - The Comedy Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels go to see what Duggee is doing but on the way Tag stumbles on some toy blocks and hurts his knee. How can they make him feel better? Happy's mum says laughter is the best medicine.

programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are ready to watch a Captain Chloe film. Suddenly, the lights go out!

programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Can Ai Help Save The Environment?
programme.desc: Scientists are using AI in many environmental projects to help analyze data and accelerate processes. But at the same time, complex AI systems require significant resources. AI and sustainability: Is it a good fit?

programme.title: Who's To Blame For Cameroon's Woes?
programme.desc: Supporters say President Paul Biya stabilized Cameroon. Critics say he's stalled democracy amid long festering armed conflict and economic stagnation. So how does Cameroon move forward? Political scientist and Biya's ex-Minister of Forestry and Wildlife Elvis Ngolle Ngolle joins Under The Baobab.

programme.title: Can Ai Help Save The Environment?
programme.desc: Scientists are using AI in many environmental projects to help analyze data and accelerate processes. But at the same time, complex AI systems require significant resources. AI and sustainability: Is it a good fit?

programme.title: Hope For India's Widows - The Holi Festival
programme.desc: India's widows suffer from exclusion and stigmatization. For decades, they have been fighting for more rights, with the help of NGOs. For the first time, widows are allowed to celebrate the festival of colors at the Gopinath Temple - a breakthrough.

programme.title: Who's To Blame For Cameroon's Woes?
programme.desc: Supporters say President Paul Biya stabilized Cameroon. Critics say he's stalled democracy amid long festering armed conflict and economic stagnation. So how does Cameroon move forward? Political scientist and Biya's ex-Minister of Forestry and Wildlife Elvis Ngolle Ngolle joins Under The Baobab.

programme.title: Can Ai Help Save The Environment?
programme.desc: Scientists are using AI in many environmental projects to help analyze data and accelerate processes. But at the same time, complex AI systems require significant resources. AI and sustainability: Is it a good fit?

programme.title: The Last Pole-And-Line Fishermen Of The Azores
programme.desc: Rod fishing has a long tradition in the Azores. It is the only method of tuna fishing permitted on the Atlantic islands - and the most sustainable. A counterpoint to industrial fishing and 'floating tuna factories.'

programme.title: Who's To Blame For Cameroon's Woes?
programme.desc: Supporters say President Paul Biya stabilized Cameroon. Critics say he's stalled democracy amid long festering armed conflict and economic stagnation. So how does Cameroon move forward? Political scientist and Biya's ex-Minister of Forestry and Wildlife Elvis Ngolle Ngolle joins Under The Baobab.

programme.title: The Last Pole-And-Line Fishermen Of The Azores
programme.desc: Rod fishing has a long tradition in the Azores. It is the only method of tuna fishing permitted on the Atlantic islands - and the most sustainable. A counterpoint to industrial fishing and 'floating tuna factories.'

programme.desc: Supporters say President Paul Biya stabilized Cameroon. Critics say he's stalled democracy amid long festering armed conflict and economic stagnation. So how does Cameroon move forward? Political scientist and Biya's ex-Minister of Forestry and Wildlife Elvis Ngolle Ngolle joins Under The Baobab.

programme.title: Hope For India's Widows - The Holi Festival
programme.desc: India's widows suffer from exclusion and stigmatization. For decades, they have been fighting for more rights, with the help of NGOs. For the first time, widows are allowed to celebrate the festival of colors at the Gopinath Temple - a breakthrough.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E7 - Pollen: Soon Everyone Allergic?

programme.title: Hong Kong Perspectives
programme.desc: Hong Kong Perspectives offers interviews with major SAR government officials, LegCo president, as well as experts from think tanks, the programme explains the essence of the Basic Law and explores how it has been implemented citing examples from the past.

programme.title: My Hong Kong Story
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Special column of character record. Through the exquisite length of about 15 minutes in each episode, it tells the stories of Hong Kong people and what happened. For the national Chinese audience, understand the new perspective of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Mainland Q&A (IV)
programme.desc: MAINLAND Q&A: Zero-distance from the heavyweights and top leaders is the draw of this program. It reveals striking details about the thoughts of the most influential decision-makers, telling viewers the pulse of the time.

programme.title: Hong Kong Perspectives
programme.desc: Hong Kong Perspectives offers interviews with major SAR government officials, LegCo president, as well as experts from think tanks, the programme explains the essence of the Basic Law and explores how it has been implemented citing examples from the past.

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E3 - Gecko’s Green Earth Week
programme.desc: Celebrate a green Earth Week with Gecko! He stops Weasel from cutting down a tree & teaches him why they are good for the planet. Then, Gecko & Grandma use rainwater to power a water wheel to recharge Green! The green inventions continue as Gecko builds a flying machine from junk, fixes a compost spreader & finds clever ways to save water at the garage!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E2 - What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? Join him for a week of fun as he learns why each day is special. Then, celebrate Valentine's Day with the Melon Patch kids as they show they care with gifts & kind words. The learning continues as Bella helps teach the class the ASL alphabet & Daniela teaches the differences between the English & Spanish ABCs! From visiting a petting zoo to learning about recycling, there's a new lesson every day!

programme.title: E4 - Magical Plants For Earth Week
programme.desc: Discover magical plants for Earth Week! Mila & Morphle water a thirsty flower & discover Shrubcub, a magic pet who makes a flowery jungle bloom! Then, they must save Pet Port when wayward vines take over. The magical adventures continue as Morphle morphs into a flying house to help animals find homes & shapes broccoli into a dinosaur that comes to life!

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!

Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E5 - September-October - a Time of Activation
programme.desc: Travel around the world to see another seasonal change unfold. The Northern Hemisphere moves into autumn, while Australia witnesses a rebirth of life, and mating humpbacks fill the warming tropical seas of Tonga.

programme.title: E6 - November-December - Full Circle
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: E2 - March-April - a Time of Renewal
programme.desc: Travel around the globe to witness the atmospheric shifts that take place in March, from the wave of cherry blossoms that unfold across Japan to the final raft of green sea turtles that arrive on the Great Barrier Reef islands to lay eggs.

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E5 - September-October - a Time of Activation
programme.desc: Travel around the world to see another seasonal change unfold. The Northern Hemisphere moves into autumn, while Australia witnesses a rebirth of life, and mating humpbacks fill the warming tropical seas of Tonga.

programme.title: E6 - November-December - Full Circle
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: E2 - Islands
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: E3 - Heat
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E6 - Buffalo Showdown
programme.desc: To the lion, the buffalo is not only a satisfying dinner but also dangerous. Track a herd of 300 buffalo along with the Mwamba pride, who must act quickly and carefully if they are to take down their prey.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E2 - Islands
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: E469
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: This refreshing cultural program shares with you the wisdom of life, extracting the truth from social events and casting new lights on the high minds of ancient sages.

programme.desc: The Wow series is explores the provinces of the Philippines, delving into its history, culture, natural resources, and people, developed with the support of Forest Foundation Philippines.

programme.title: Mmk[Live]
programme.desc: Dubbed as the longest-running drama anthology on Philippine TV with Charo Santos - Concio narrating real-life stories of ordinary people in this award-winning masterpiece that takes pride of its well-crafted storylines, excellent performances and topnotch production details.

programme.title: Incognito

The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

E4 - Trans Mission
programme.desc: When a major breakdown threatens to shut down the mine, Claudia and Robin make a risky decision to get desperately needed fuel into camp.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Renee catches a croc three times her size but Ryan is struggling. John takes Renee and Ryan on an overnight trip where they must share a motel room with crocodiles and the chance to go to Kakadu is on everyone’s mind.

programme.title: E2 - Heavy Haulage Mission – Giants on the Move
programme.desc: Transports with difficulties. Whether a nearly 50-metre-long rotor blade or a 75-metre-long, gigantic gearbox with a total weight of 442 tonnes - obstacles lurk everywhere. The transport leads uphill, through narrow turns, past houses right at the edge of the road, over soggy paths and through narrow bridges. It requires the utmost precision and concentration, because mistakes are not allowed to happen here.

programme.title: E4 - Exploring Western Canada
programme.desc: In Revelstoke, Alexis and Thomas discover slackcountry skiing, a hybrid between resort and backcountry skiing. Though seemingly more accessible, slackcountry carries the same avalanche and rescue risks.

programme.title: E10 - Julie De Libran
programme.desc: One of the most Parisian and unusual designers discusses her spring-summer 2023 haute couture collection. The focus is firmly on the versatility of the garments, the work on the bias and sequins...

programme.title: E5 - Special Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Direction for to visit Rodin's home and studio. Ceramic artist Gregoire Scalabre sculpts and accumulates to enter another dimension, between tiny and gigantic. The John Galliano show for Maison Margiela: a journey through time and the strange. Artist Amandine Antunes masters the stucco marble technique.

programme.title: E84
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E100
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E36 - In Uzes (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in Gard olive oil and in the Fenestrelle Tower.

programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones' journey across NZ using only the back roads sees him travel from Queenstown, over The Remarkables, and finishes his trip at the very tip of the country, Bluff.

programme.desc: We go behind the scenes with Coca Cola Zero Sugar as they produce 1 billion litres of the iconic drink. programme.title: Exodus
programme.desc: Tsim Kin Yip has been an ordinary beat cop for more than two decades, failing all the promotion interviews he's tried over the years. One afternoon, Tsim is on duty in the report room. Kwan Ping Man, a suspect accused of peeping in a women's washroom, is giving a statement. Tsim heard the big secret from Kwan there's a global women's organization plotting to kill all the men in the world. Tsim finds the story ridiculous but no choice but to write down what he's told. That night, Kwan's statement has gone missing. He returns to the station to take another report, but this time Kwan has switched his story and pleads guilty. It seems he has something to hide. Tsim's suspicions are aroused and he decides to do some investigating...

programme.title: Cops And Robbers
programme.desc: A young man who was addicted to firearms wanted to be admitted to the police. He was not admitted because of his eye disease, which caused him psychological imbalance and he killed people everywhere. The police set up a special unit to arrest him. A fledgling policeman met the murderer on a narrow road...

programme.title: Esprit D'Amour
programme.desc: Koo, an insurance investigator, is sent to make enquiries regarding a case of accidental death. He is surprised to learn that the victim is the same ghost who has spoken to him the night before. Koo is fascinated in working on the case. One night, Yu's spirit appeared in Koo's apartment. Her beauty and pleasant personality intrigued Koo. They get involved into a romance between man and a spirit. Will Koo and Yu be reunited or will Yu remain, as always, Koo's esprit d'amour?.

programme.title: E11 - 收官之旅 不說再見 (上)
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: 2024 Jiangsu Count Down Concert (Repackaged)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「用奮斗點亮幸福」為主題，聚焦「幸福是什麼」，精心提煉五大篇章，以奮斗為筆，譜幸福樂章；誠邀實力唱將林俊傑、周深、張靚穎、周華健、王源(TFBOYS)、曾舜晞、顏人中、孟子義等重磅集結，一起迎接2024。
